title: Pan-Seared Canadian Duck Breast with Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful dish that pairs the richness of pan-seared duck breast with the savory flavors of a stir fry.
instructions: Season the duck breast with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Sear the duck breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the duck breast to a plate and let it rest.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil.
Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until they start to soften.
Add the snow peas and cook until they are tender but still crisp.
Add the soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Serve the stir fry alongside the pan-seared duck breast.
